injuries.comment: The Stars said that Duchene is OUT for Saturday's (Oct. 25) game against the Hurricanes.
The Hurricanes said that Miller is OUT for Saturday's (Oct. 25) game versus the Stars.
The Hurricanes said on Saturday (Oct. 25) that Robinson won't be coming back anytime soon.
The Hurricanes said on Saturday (Oct. 25) that Carrier won't be coming back anytime soon.
